ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: De antiquitate urbis Patavii, et claris civibus Patavinis, libri tres, in quindecim classes distincti. Eiusdem Appendix De Sepulchris insignibus exterorum patavii iacentium
ItacWorkItem.Notes: At p. 260: `Audio enim nunc in nova Elevatorum Academia hic Patavii` et c.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Cum gratia et privilegio Caesareo ad annos sex: et Regis Galliarum, ad annos totidem.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
